## Verification

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `./build.sh check`
- [ ] `WOC_NO_LAUNCH=1 ./build.sh preview`
- [ ] `WOC_SKIP_RESOURCE_CHECK=1 ./scripts/verify.sh`
- [ ] Relevant preview state/page/text-size combinations inspected
- [ ] User-facing strings are localized and fixtures contain no private or live player identities
- [ ] Documentation, privacy, credits, or changelog updated when behavior changed
